trigger.notes: Organic clicks fell 28% week over week on the primary service cluster.

audit.summary: Traffic drop investigation identified one likely technical issue and one likely intent/CTR issue.

issues.title: A high-value service page may have fallen out of the index.
evidence: Primary service page lost impressions sharply.

issues.title: Homepage CTR declined after a recent copy change.
evidence: CTR down on high-impression brand-adjacent queries.

actions.title: Investigate indexation and request recrawl if needed.
actions.expected_impact: Recover lost visibility from a likely indexation issue.
